backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the shoe store backend with a Product type, sample data initialization, and blob storage mixin; exposes product data via a stable Map keyed by Nat ID.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping five product requirements (homepage, listing, detail, cart, theme) to their implementing source files and component dependencies with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-sentence descriptions of every frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the project's component and page structure.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes used by shadcn-ui components.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell with a root div and a module script tag that bootstraps the React application via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with four routes (home, product listing, product detail, cart) and wraps the app in CartProvider.
frontend/src/components/CartItem.tsx: Cart row component displaying a product thumbnail, name, size, quantity increment/decrement controls, line-item total, and a remove button.
frontend/src/components/CartSummary.tsx: Sticky order summary panel showing subtotal, shipping, and total with a checkout CTA button and a continue-shopping navigation link.
frontend/src/components/CategoryFilter.t: Row of filter buttons for All/Sneakers/Boots/Sandals/Formal categories with amber highlight on the active selection.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedProducts: Displays a grid of up to 4 featured products fetched via `useAllProducts`, with loading skeletons, error state, and links to the full product listing.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand logo, shop category links, info links, copyright, and a caffeine.ai attribution badge.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-width hero banner section with a background image, headline copy, and two CTA buttons that navigate to the products page.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with logo, desktop/mobile nav links by category, and a cart icon with item count badge.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Card component for a single product showing image, category badge, name, description, price, and a quick-add-to-cart button with brief confirmation feedback.
frontend/src/components/ProductGrid.tsx: Renders a responsive grid of `ProductCard` components with loading skeleton placeholders and an empty-state message when no products match.
frontend/src/components/SizeSelector.tsx: Renders a row of toggle buttons for selecting a shoe size (US), highlighting the currently selected size in amber.
frontend/src/components/SortDropdown.tsx: A styled select dropdown for choosing product sort order: newest, price low-to-high, or price high-to-low.
frontend/src/contexts/CartContext.tsx: React context providing cart state (items, totals) with add, remove, update-quantity, and clear actions, persisted to localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an Internet Computer actor (authenticated or anonymous) via React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching products (all, by category, by price, by ID) and a mutation hook for initializing the backend with seed data.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Barlow fonts, configuring Tailwind layers, and defining a charcoal dark theme with amber accent CSS custom properties.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility functions for merging Tailwind class names, formatting prices from cents to USD currency strings, and mapping backend image paths to local generated assets.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Cart page displaying cart items and a summary panel, with an empty-state prompt to start shopping and navigation back to the product listing.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page featuring a hero section, category navigation strip, featured products, and a promotional banner; auto-initializes backend data if no products exist.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetailPage.tsx: Product detail page that fetches a single product by ID, allows size selection, and handles adding the item to the cart with loading and error states.
frontend/src/pages/ProductListingPage.ts: Product listing page that fetches all products and applies client-side category filtering and price sorting, rendering results in a product grid with a filters bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, defining dark mode, custom fonts (Barlow), oklch-based color tokens (charcoal, offwhite, amber, sidebar, chart, etc.), border radius, and plugins (typography, container-queries, animate).
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of a shoe shop website project, including schema version, feature list (homepage, product listing, product detail, cart, visual theme), required images, and new feature requests with their statuses.
